examples: They might have been soldiers in civvies.
She was sharp, she was demanding, she was disappointed when I said that was enough and changed back into my civvies.
Thein Sein, the former general who donned civvies to become president, met her in August, and persuaded her of the sincerity of his reformism.
The Brazilian rookie looked none too pleased as he was back in his civvies following his plunge into the tyres which looks to have ended his first day on the track.
